calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Christina Nalchajian, Esq., for Gregory Kelly, Executor.

At the court's query, counsel offers advocacy regarding the apparent failure to fully insure the cash assets as set forth in code Sec. 9700, citing code Sec. 9600.

After additional discussion, counsel is advised that the court will grant the petition (subject to review of the proposed order) but that it is this court's view that accounts are not to exceed the FDIC limit of $250,000.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Continued To May-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-26-2016 and codicil dated Jul-01-2016 are admitted to probate. Gregory Kelly is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-11-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
